name: Australian Primary Hemp Limited
summary: Australian Primary Hemp Limited manufactures and distributes hemp products under the Australian Primary Hemp brand to retail, wholesale, and white label customers in Australia. The company offers hemp seeds, cold pressed hemp oil, hemp fiber powder, hemp flour, hemp protein powder, hemp and bush balm mint hand sanitizers, hemp boost, hemp balance, and hemp and honey nut bars. It is also involved in the cultivation and production of hemp; handling various areas of hemp seed selection, farming, processing, and distribution; hemp contract packaging; and bulk and retail sale of edible hemp products. The company was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Geelong, Australia.
